description: An existing customer referred a new customer who has just signed up. The existing customer is now owed a referral bonus.

nodes.task_description: Verify the new customer signed up using the existing customer's unique referral code.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the referral link was used.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the new customer has made their first payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the condition for the bonus has been met.

nodes.task_description: Apply the referral bonus (e.g., a one-month service credit) to the existing customer's account.

expected_outcome.value: The referring customer receives their bonus.
